tasks.subject: Task 1: Add handlers field to policyType
tasks.description: Extend policyType with optional handlers field (lazyAttrsOf raw, default {}). Add test.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Lift policy merge into pipeline computation
tasks.description: Move policy merge from pre-computation setup into fx.handle via resolve-policy effect. Add resolvePolicyHandler to defaultHandlers.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Replace buildTarget with resolve-target effect + policy handlers
tasks.description: Delete buildTarget, send resolve-target effect instead. Collect policy handlers and scope.provide them per-transition. Add test for handler scoping.
